lines: Dene, you absolute passenger — both Bosnia and Senegal are gone, Senegal going out in extra time like they couldn't even be bothered to lose efficiently. You've got France left and that's it, mate. One team. Sitting 8th on 35pts watching everyone else have fun. Brutal.

England did the business 2–1 over DR Congo, which is great news for Carter (climbing to 2nd on 54pts) and Wilmot (joint 3rd on 51pts), but absolutely fucks Butters' DR Congo — though to be fair, Butters is still top of the table on 59pts and has Portugal AND Morocco still in it, the smug bastard.

Speaking of Butters, today's the big one for the leaderboard: Portugal vs Croatia in the Round of 32. Butters wants Portugal through, Al (5th, 38pts) wants Croatia — winner takes a chunk of pride and points, loser has to explain why they backed the wrong horse in what should be a proper match.

Carter's got a nervous one too — Switzerland vs Algeria today. Algeria going through keeps Carter's three-team party alive. Switzerland are no mugs though, so fingers crossed, Carter, you're only 5pts off the top.

Keep an eye on Spain vs Austria — Jim (7th, 38pts) needs Spain to keep winning because Sweden are already gone and Qatar were an embarrassment, so it's literally Jim's last hope of being relevant in this sweepstake.
